releaseNotes.headline: Every setting stays within reach
releaseNotes.summary: Version 0.2.6 makes every Settings page scroll so controls remain reachable in the fixed-size window.

highlights.title: Reach every control
highlights.detail: Scroll through Settings to reach updates, About, What’s New, and Quit even when the window is compact.

highlights.title: Consistent detail pages
highlights.detail: AI Tools, iPhone Sync, feedback, and pairing pages now share the same reliable scrolling behavior.
